name: Gardenia Easter Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red bell pepper, quartered and thinly sliced
8 oz Precooked smoked ham, thinly sliced in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Roll out half of dough and line a 9-inch buttered pie pan.
3. Saute peppers and ham in oil for 3 minutes; season with pepper.
4. Whisk eggs and ricotta in a large bowl.
5. Spread the mixture in the pastry shell.
6. Pat spinach dry, sprinkle on top.
7. Sprinkle saute mix over spinach and top with mozzarella.
8. Add basil.
9. Roll out remaining dough and cover pie.
10. Trim edges.
11. Cut 4 vents and brush top with beaten egg.
12. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until golden brown. Set aside for 20 minutes before serving.
